title: Oil surpasses $90 and gas returns to $4 due to tensions in the Middle East
summary: Houthis threaten to block the Red Sea and Iranian attacks on oil tankers raise the price of crude, which skyrockets the cost of fuels.

title: Wall Street falls amid escalation of US-Iran conflict
summary: The main New York indices close lower as investors fear a military escalation in the Middle East.

title: Gold and silver climb on Middle East tensions and Fed outlook
summary: Gold surpasses $4,000 and silver rises amid risk aversion and expectations of Federal Reserve rate cuts.

title: London Stock Exchange plans night trading from 2027
summary: The new trading platform aims to attract international investors and compete with other financial centers during night hours.

title: US judge suspends Warner Bros and Paramount merger
summary: The $110 billion acquisition of Paramount remains on hold while antitrust implications are reviewed.

title: Morgan Stanley capitalizes on AI boom with debt deals
summary: The investment bank closes major financing operations linked to artificial intelligence companies.

title: Bitcoin and Ethereum trade mixed due to conflicting outlooks
summary: Cryptocurrencies show mixed signals after a volatile weekend with conflicting opinions on the second half of 2026.

title: Ibex 35 closes nearly flat due to uncertainty in the Middle East
summary: The Spanish index remains around 19,200 points awaiting corporate results and developments in the conflict.
